query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conversations` (
  `id` varchar(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  `visitorId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `visitorName` text,
  `visitorEmail` varchar(320),
  `assignedAgentId` int,
  `cartValue` int DEFAULT 0,
  `cartItems` json,
  `status` enum('active', 'waiting', 'closed', 'archived') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'widget' NOT NULL,
  `tags` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `closedAt` timestamp,
  INDEX `idx_visitorId` (`visitorId`),
  INDEX `idx_status` (`status`),
  INDEX `idx_createdAt` (`createdAt`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `messages` (
  `id` varchar(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  `conversationId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `senderId` int,
  `senderType` enum('visitor', 'agent', 'system') NOT NULL,
  `senderName` text,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('text', 'image', 'file', 'system') DEFAULT 'text' NOT NULL,
  `isRead` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`conversationId`) REFERENCES `conversations`(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_conversationId` (`conversationId`),
  INDEX `idx_createdAt` (`createdAt`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chatSettings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `widgetTitle` text,
  `widgetSubtitle` text,
  `widgetColor` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#F59E0B',
  `widgetPosition` enum('bottom-right', 'bottom-left') DEFAULT 'bottom-right' NOT NULL,
  `showWhenOffline` boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  `offlineMessage` text,
  `enableAbandonmentDetection` boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  `abandonmentDelay` int DEFAULT 120000,
  `abandonmentMessage` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chatAnalytics` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `conversationId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `messageCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `responseTime` int,
  `resolutionTime` int,
  `rating` int,
  `feedback` text,
  `cartValueAtStart` int,
  `cartValueAtEnd` int,
  `orderPlaced` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`conversationId`) REFERENCES `conversations`(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_conversationId` (`conversationId`)
);

INSERT INTO `chatSettings` (`widgetTitle`, `widgetSubtitle`, `widgetColor`, `widgetPosition`, `showWhenOffline`, `enableAbandonmentDetection`, `abandonmentDelay`) 
VALUES ('Chat with us', 'We are here to help', '#F59E0B', 'bottom-right', true, true, 120000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `id` = `id`;

  `rating` int,

  `cartValueAtStart` int,
  `cartValueAtEnd` int,
  `orderPlaced` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`conversationId`) REFERENCES `conversations`(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_conversationId` (`conversationId`)
);
